name: @gal-run/gal-evals
description: Deterministic, rule-based evaluation framework: suites, scoring, and deployment gates for agents

scripts.eval:email: npm run build && node dist/cli/evaluate.js --suite suites/email-triage.json --adapter email-rules
scripts.eval:email:predictions: npm run build && node dist/cli/evaluate.js --suite suites/email-triage.json --adapter prediction-file --predictions fixtures/email-triage-perfect-predictions.json
scripts.eval:all: npm run eval:email && npm run eval:email:predictions
